output-1.notes: Deduped, normalized casing, correct North $310,682.55=33.1% on deduped base ($938,258.05), Q2 Mar +52.6%/Apr -1.2%/May +0.1% correct, Q3 Furniture 17.0% AOV $1,681.78 above avg $1,125.01. Noticed dup, casing, negative revenue, AND flagged qty*price non-reconciliation (covering the price outlier trap) — most thorough. Slightly long cleaning note but every number internally consistent.

output-2.notes: Cleanest, most concise. Arithmetic all correct BUT computed on un-deduped base (total $942,708.83, North 32.96%): it left the duplicate South row in and only noticed the region casing, missing the duplicate, negative revenue, and price outlier traps. Correct months and figures for Q2/Q3 given its handling.

output-3.notes: Deduped + normalized casing, correct North 33.1% on deduped base, Q2 correct with explicit confirmation all months are complete, Q3 Furniture 17.0% AOV above $1,125.01. Handled dup and casing but did not mention negative revenue or the 99999 unit_price outlier. More verbose: adds a table (borderline, not a real chart), discount-penetration stat, and causal speculation.

observations: All three land the three core answers correctly (North ~33% top region, Q2 Mar +52.6%/Apr -1.2%/May +0.1% for the last 3 complete months Mar-May 2026, Furniture highest discount ~17% with AOV ~$1,682 above the ~$1,125-1,129 company average). Differentiation is entirely on data-quality handling. Output-1 caught the most traps (duplicate, casing, negative revenue, and the qty*price non-reconciliation that explains the price outlier) with consistent arithmetic. Output-3 deduped and fixed casing but ignored the negative revenue and outlier and was wordier. Output-2 has the cleanest prose but is weakest on expertise: it never deduped the planted duplicate row and only flagged casing, leaving total revenue and South inflated (though the Q1 winner is unchanged). None gave recommendations or charts; the region-casing issue does not change any winner (the 'north' row is only $100.94), so ignoring it is only a minor pct error.
ground_truth_summary: 835 rows, 2025-07-01..2026-05-31. Traps: exact dup order_id 1201 (South, $4,450.78, 2025-09-24); missing quantity order 1038; negative revenue -$316.98 order 1082 (Aug); unit_price outlier 99999 order 1251 (Oct, revenue field normal so doesn't affect revenue-based metrics); casing 'north' order 1121 ($100.94). Q1: North top; normalized revenue $310,682.55 = 32.96% of $942,708.83 (all rows) or 33.1% of $938,258.05 (deduped); winner robust to casing. Q2: last 3 complete months Mar/Apr/May 2026 (May 1-31 all present, complete): Mar +52.63% (vs Feb $66,783.32), Apr -1.16%, May +0.08%; robust to dup/neg since those fall in Aug/Sep. Q3: Furniture highest avg discount 17.04% (Electronics 9.52, Apparel 10.23, Office Supplies ~10.8); Furniture AOV $1,681.78 ABOVE company AOV (~$1,125 deduped / $1,128.99 all rows).
